title: Construction of Subpart
doc_html:
§3397.2.  Construction of Subpart

This Subpart is a complete, additional, and alternative method for doing what is authorized hereby and is supplemental and additional to powers conferred by other laws.

Acts 2004, No. 672, §1, eff. July 5, 2004.
